descriptionShort: Jason Phillips scores three goals as Richmond Sockeyes win Centennial Cup championship 7-3 over Dartmouth.
descriptionLong: Jason Phillips scored three goals to lead the Richmond Sockeyes to a 7-3 victory over the Dartmouth Fuel Kids in the Centennial Cup junior-A hockey championship on May 4, 1987, in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Bryon Moller, Steve Jaques, Dave Tomlinson, and Matt Hervey also scored for Richmond, who dominated with 44 shots. Dartmouth suffered their second consecutive loss after falling 7-2 to host Humboldt the previous day.
